message:
perf: add #[inline] to record types (TaskState, RegionRecord, ObligationState)

Sweep 5 final: The core record types are accessed on every poll cycle
but had almost no inline annotations. Added #[inline] to TaskState
predicates (is_terminal, is_cancelling, can_be_polled), TaskRecord
accessors (created_at, is_runnable, state_name, phase), RegionRecord
accessors (state, budget, limits, pending_obligations, has_live_work),
and ObligationState/ObligationKind predicates and lookup methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
